Is 15972 a prime number?

A prime number is a natural number greater than 1 that has no positive divisors other than 1 and itself.

Checking if 15972 is divisible by any numbers...

15972 ÷ 4 = 3993 (divisible)

15972 is divisible by multiple numbers, therefore it is not a prime number.
